authoritative_requirement: Genesis begins from an explicitly unratified Draft Harness Model.
implementation_evidence: Exact DraftHarnessModel identity and field authority validation

authoritative_requirement: Use a dependency-driven one-question-at-a-time decision protocol.
implementation_evidence: Deterministic decision graph and question package

authoritative_requirement: Every Genesis choice is a complete typed versioned decision node.
Expose only nodes whose evidence authority contracts and earlier decisions are satisfied.
Present one primary constitutional question per turn.
Present evidence state alternatives trade-offs consequences and a clear recommendation.
